name: Peerless Arbiter Ceyla Dorr
text: When this Personnel enters play, you may search your deck for a Diplomat and put it into your hand.

name: Peacekeeper Lys Andrell
text: When this team prevents a battle, draw a card.

name: Orator Kil Vessar
text: If this team passes a CHA check, you gain 1 victory point.

name: Envoy Reeka Sol
text: When this away team completes a mission, gain 1 Influence resource.

name: Engineer Lira Norrin
text: When played, you may recycle a Tech resource to search your deck for a Manufact and put it in hand.

name: Navigator Tel Vesk
text: When this team explores a new Location, draw a card.

name: Astro-Linguist Javo
text: Once per turn, if you pass an INT check, you may look at the top card of your deck.

name: Expeditionary AI PEL-X9
text: If you win an INT check by 2 or more, untap this Personnel.

name: Blade Marshal Trok Varn
text: When this Personnel leads an attack, your team gains STR +1.

name: Warband Slayer Kaath
text: When this Personnel scraps a target, untap them at end of combat.

name: Siegebreaker Rad Druk
text: Whenever this team attacks a disabled Ship, deal 1 extra damage.

name: Taskmaster Kreel
text: Whenever you win a STR check, this team may draw a card.

name: Acolyte Zelia Vos
text: Once per game, you may recycle this Personnel to draw 2 cards.

name: Seer Lin Makar
text: When you pass a WRD skill check, look at the top 2 cards of your deck and reorder.

name: Augur Ixis
text: This team may use WRD in place of INT for skill checks on missions.

name: Visionweaver Mylos
text: When this Personnel is recycled, gain 1 Mystical resource.

text: *Crew 1*

text: *Crew 1*

name: Mauler Gunboat
text: *Crew 2*

text: *Crew 0*

text: *Crew 1*. If this Ship attacks and wins, untap it.

name: Conquest-Class Dreadnought
text: *Crew 3*. Ships attacked by this Ship are disabled after combat until the end of your next turn.

name: Wraith-Runner Craft
text: *Crew 1*

name: Ghostline Corvette

text: *Crew 3*

name: Spectral Hum Vessel
text: *Crew 2*. When this Ship is deployed, you may untap a Mystic at its Location.

text: *Crew 3*. When this Ship attempts a mission, its crew adds +1 WRD for all checks.

text: *Crew 1*

name: Portable Comms Array
text: A member of this away team has CHA +1.

name: Field Medikit
text: A Medic in this team has INT +1.

name: Peacekeeper’s Seal
text: A member of this team has CHA +1.

name: Diplomatic Credential
text: A Diplomat in this team has CHA +1.

name: Scanner-Bot
text: When landed, scrap _this_ 🞂 look at the seeded Manufacts.

name: Hyperspectral Analyzer
text: A Scientist in this away team has WRD +1.

name: Stellar Cartogram
text: This Ship has RNG +1 if an Explorer is present.

name: Assault Breaching Gear
text: A Soldier in this away team has STR +1.

name: Shock Field Generator
text: A member of this away team has STR +1 when defending.

name: Combat Drugs
text: Scrap _this_ 🞂 a Soldier in this away team has STR +3.

name: Warlord’s Banner
text: A Commander in this team has CHA +1.

name: Blackmail File
text: When this team is rolling CHA, scrap _this_ 🞂 replace the roll outcome with 6.

name: Disruptor Toolset
text: This Ship has WPN +1 if an Engineer is present.

name: Cloaking Mesh
text: When this Ship enters hyperspace, put a *cloaked* marker on it (_it cannot be attacked or targeted_). Remove it when it lands, attacks, or when a card is moved in or out of it.

name: Ghost Hyperdrive
text: This Ship has RNG +2.

name: Neural Focusing Crystal
text: A member of this team has WRD +1.

name: Psi-Transducer
text: A member of this crew has WRD +1.

name: Psychic Resonator
text: A Priest in this team may roll CHA instead of INT.

name: Reality Anchor
text: A Priest in this away team has WRD +2.

name: Compact Astrogator
text: This Ship has RNG +1 if a Scientist is present.

name: External Supply Cache
text: This Ship has HLD +1.

name: Quantum Winch
text: This Ship may move Cargo to and from land as if it had *landers* (_but it cannot move Personnel this way_).

name: Retroviral Plague
d6: Put a *plague* marker on target away team. The plague infects any team who gets in contact with a member of an infected team. A Medic may attempt to cure it with an INT check vs 8. At the end of your turn, roll a D6: scrap all infected Personnel with that D6 value.

name: Hypergate Bandwidth Saturation
d6: Play on a Ship in hyperspace: it cannot re-enter normal space. From the next turn, the crew may attempt an INT check vs 7 to nullify _this_.

name: Xenomorph Birth
d6: A random Humanoid of target crew dies as a xenomorph bursts from their belly and hides in the Ship. At the end of each of your turn, the xenomorph attacks and the crew must defend vs 9.

name: Internal Turmoil
d6: Scrap target player's Personnel in the resource zone. #quote(attribution: [Marl Kraxx, Galactic Economist])[When undergoing internal turmoil, empires divest resources from exploration and research, ultimatly decreasing their astropolitical clout and worsening the crisis that caused the turmoil in the first place.]
